sourceTitle: Generative AI tools available at MIT
verificationNotes: IS&T catalog of approved/licensed generative AI tools at MIT. Lists tools (Adobe Firefly, AWS Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, Google Gemini, Microsoft Copilot, ChatGPT, Parley, etc.) with access levels and risk classifications. Includes policy-relevant notes: no GenAI tools approved for High Risk information. Updated 10/27/2025. Primarily informational/catalog rather than policy document, but contains important approved-tools and risk-classification information relevant to AI policy tracking.
